def get_status_label(code):
    labels = {200: "OK", 404: "Not Found", 500: "Server Error"}
    return labels.get(code, "Unknown")


def classify_message(msg_type):
    mapping = {"error": "critical", "warn": "warning", "info": "normal", "debug": "low"}
    return mapping.get(msg_type, "unknown")


def get_priority_weight(priority):
    weights = {"critical": 4, "high": 3, "medium": 2, "low": 1}
    return weights.get(priority, 0)


def build_headers(content_type):
    headers = {
        "Content-Type": content_type,
        "Cache-Control": "no-cache",
        "X-Request-Id": generate_id(),
    }
    return headers


def format_currency(amount, currency):
    symbols = {"USD": "$", "EUR": "€", "GBP": "£", "JPY": "¥"}
    symbol = symbols.get(currency, currency)
    return f"{symbol}{amount:.2f}"
